Intro_Elara_Dialogue0: ^Let's see here, looks like were all set up correctly.
^For a shitty old PC it doesn't look too bad, I did get a nice deal at that garage sale.
^Well, now to see if she really works.
Intro_Elara_Dialogue2: ^I'm not sure if I like that...
^Perhaps its just something with the screen, I mean it is pretty old...
Tutorial1_Elara: ^Well, no use in questioning it now, no matter how odd.
^I gotta find a way out of here.
^Perhaps, if I use these windows I can get to that red one over there.
Tutorial2_Elara: ^Hmmm, it seems they can't hear me.
Tutorial3_Elara: ^That voice, it's still there, I suppose I must continue forward.
Tutorial4_Elara: ^It's getting more complicated too, come on Elara you got this.
^Just a simple puzzle you love these.
